description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a short-sleeved collared shirt with a visible undershirt at the neckline, paired with straight-cut trousers and athletic shoes. The figure has a well-defined build and stands with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral or T-pose. The shirt features a buttoned collar and is tucked into the pants, which are secured with a belt. The shoes are low-cut and appear to be designed for casual or athletic use. The hairstyle is short and neatly styled, with the hair combed back and sides trimmed close. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is clean and contemporary, suitable for an urban environment.
description: An adult male in a collared shirt, trousers, and athletic shoes, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has a short, neat hairstyle and a casual yet tidy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, undershirt, belt, and facial features clearly, with arms extended to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the shirt and pants, and the side of the shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt and pants, the back of the head, and the outstretched arms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and side details of the clothing and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved collared shirt with undershirt, straight-cut trousers, and a belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
